stem: There were no zebra mussels in a certain river before 1985, when 18 zebra mussels were introduced. By 2010 the population of zebra mussels had reached approximately 5 billion. If the population grew exponentially, this corresponds to a 13.5% increase, on average, in the population each year. Which of the following functions best models the population p(t) of zebra mussels t years after 1985?
rationale: Choice D is correct. An exponential growth model has the form p(t) = A(1 + r)t, where A is the initial population and r is the annual growth rate. With A = 18 and r = 0.135, p(t) = 18(1.135)t. Choices A, B, and C misapply the form.
